details.reasoning: Excellent implementation that fully meets all rubric requirements. The package is properly structured under packages/ with comprehensive package.json (referencing @prisma/dmmf, @prisma/generator, @prisma/generator-helper). Entry point (bin.ts) correctly uses generatorHandler with both onManifest and onGenerate callbacks. Generator class properly implements the Generator interface, reads DMMF, and iterates over models. For each model, generates full TypeScript interfaces (base, CreateInput, UpdateInput, WhereUniqueInput) and implements all 5 CRUD methods (findMany, findUnique, create, update, delete) with proper typing. Output is correctly written to the generator output directory. Code demonstrates strong TypeScript conventions with proper error handling, enum support, composite key handling, relation field exclusion, and auto-generated field detection. Comprehensive test suite (6 test files) covers all major components with high confidence. Properly integrated into monorepo CI/CD workflow. Only minor deduction for potential edge cases in real-world usage, but implementation is robust and production-ready.
